narrative:
South Richland Twp (precinct in Defiance County) has 412 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 41.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 12.6%, a pronounced Republican lean of 29.1 percentage points.
